Sobre About Mi Me

Conoce mi trayectoria profesional y experiencia. Learn about my professional journey and experience.

Angel Archbold

Software Developer

Specialized in web development, cloud services and data science. Extensive experience in custom software development for large and small companies. Areas of expertise: relational marketing, education, public services, ecommerce, accounting. Passionate about technology, video games and gym.

angelarchbold09@gmail.com | Barranquilla, Colombia
